name: Haaland Sinks Brazil as the Last Eight Is Set
angle: The round of 16 closes with a jolt: Erling Haaland strikes twice late to knock five-time champions Brazil out and carry Norway into a first ever World Cup quarter-final, while a ten-man England survive an Estadio Azteca classic against Mexico to complete the last eight.

questions.question: Which nation knocked five-time champions Brazil out of the 2026 World Cup in the round of 16?
Who scored twice to complete Norway's stunning victory over Brazil?
England reached the quarter-finals by winning 3-2 against which nation at the Estadio Azteca?
Beating Brazil took Norway into the first World Cup quarter-final in their history. Which stage had been their previous best?
Haaland's double against Brazil took his tournament tally to how many goals, joining the leaders at the top of the scoring charts?
Which Brazil forward converted a stoppage-time consolation penalty in the defeat to Norway?
Which England midfielder struck twice to put his side 2-0 up against Mexico?
England restored their lead against Mexico from the penalty spot in the second half through which captain?
England saw out the win over Mexico a man light after which defender was shown a straight red card?
Victory over Mexico set up an England quarter-final against which surprise package of the last eight?
Brazil's round-of-16 defeat was their earliest exit from a World Cup since which year?
Which Brazil midfielder had a first-half penalty saved by Norway goalkeeper Orjan Nyland?
Which Mexico striker pulled a goal back from the penalty spot to make it 3-2 against England?
This was Norway's first World Cup since 1998, the tournament where they also beat Brazil 2-1 in the group stage. Brazil went into that 1998 meeting as the reigning what?
Which Norway substitute delivered the cross for Haaland's opening goal against Brazil?

sources: https://www.aljazeera.com/sports/2026/7/5/haaland-scores-twice-as-norway-stun-brazil-2-1-in-world-cup-2026-last-16 (Norway 2-1 Brazil: Haaland 79' and 90'; Nyland saved Bruno Guimaraes first-half penalty; Neymar consolation penalty deep in stoppage time; Schjelderup crossed for Haaland's opener; Haaland to seven tournament goals, level with Messi; Norway's first ever quarter-final; face Mexico or England in Miami July 11)
https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49279982/brazil-norway-world-cup-2026-erling-haaland (Haaland and Norway condemn Brazil to their earliest World Cup exit since 1990)
https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49280315/haaland-brings-thunder-strikes-brazil-norway-reach-quarterfinals-2026-world-cup (Haaland brace; Nyland penalty save; Norway reach first quarter-final)

https://www.cbssports.com/soccer/news/brazil-norway-live-updates-world-cup-2026-score-result/live/ (Sorloth and Nusa subbed for Bobb and Schjelderup at half-time; Schjelderup supplied the crosses for Haaland)

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Norway_at_the_FIFA_World_Cup (Norway appearances 1938, 1994, 1998, 2026; previous best round of 16 in 1938 and 1998; 1998 included a 2-1 group win over reigning champions Brazil)

https://www.cbssports.com/soccer/news/mexico-england-live-updates-world-cup-2026-score-result/live/ (Mexico 2-3 England at the Azteca; Bellingham brace to 2-0; Quinones volley; Quansah straight red 54'; Kane penalty 60' after Gordon fouled by Rangel; Raul Jimenez penalty for Mexico; England advance with ten men)

https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/world-cup-2026-bracket-schedule-scores-results-live-updates-round-of-16-130000983.html (England hold off Mexico, Norway topple Brazil; England v Norway quarter-final)
